recentPosts.title: the wrong split
recentPosts.excerpt: When the planner/executor pattern works and when it fails — agent identity isn't separable from tool runtime.

recentPosts.title: the friendship test
recentPosts.excerpt: Tennessee's HB1455 makes it a felony to build AI a user might feel friendship with. An unusual definitional move.
